description_long: This is a square pillow with a light gray base color and an intricate geometric pattern resembling a stylized city map or urban grid, rendered in a slightly darker gray. The pillow appears to be made of a soft, woven cotton fabric, giving it a comfortable and inviting look. Both the front and back faces display the same pattern, while the sides taper slightly, indicating a plush, filled interior. There is a small, dark, circular label or patch with white Asian characters in one corner, adding a unique decorative touch. The pillow's surface is matte and soft, with no visible stains or signs of wear. The object is shown isolated, with no surrounding context or furniture.
description: A square, light gray pillow with a detailed geometric city map pattern and a small dark label in one corner, made of soft cotton fabric.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full geometric pattern and a dark label with white Asian characters in the upper left corner.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the pillow's thickness and the way the pattern distorts along the edge, with the label barely visible.
description_view_2: Back view mirroring the front, with the geometric pattern and a similar dark label in the upper right corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the pillow's thickness and the central seam, with the label more visible at the top.
attribute_brand_logo: dark circular patch with white Asian characters in the upper corner
attribute_tag_or_label: dark circular label with white Asian characters in the upper corner
